basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Scientist -I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee has released the official notification for 4 Project Scientist -I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Project Scientist -I: Ph.D. degree or M.Tech./M.E. degree in Electronics/Electrical Engineering or a relevant discipline from a recognized university or institute. Proven research experience in RF circuit design, particularly in areas related to power amplifiers or RF/microwave circuits. Desirable: At least one research publication in a Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal or a reputed international conference.

salary_details.details: Project Scientist -I: Rs. 56000 +10% HRA. 5% increase for every two years of experience.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on submitted documents Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Project Scientist -I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
